title: 链表
content:
203.移除链表元素

```python
# Definition for singly-linked list.
# class ListNode:
#     def __init__(self, val=0, next=None):
#         self.val = val
#         self.next = next
class Solution:
    def removeElements(self, head: Optional[ListNode], val: int) -> Optional[ListNode]:
        v_head = ListNode(next = head)
        current = v_head
        while current.next:#虚拟头的下一个就是链表的开始节点
            if current.next.val == val:#遍历链表查找有没有val
                current.next = current.next.next#若有val则直接连接到它的下一节点
            else:
                current = current.next
        return v_head.next
```

707.设计链表

```python
class ListNode:
    def __init__(self,val=0,next=None):
        self.val = val
        self.next = next
class MyLinkedList:
    def __init__(self):
        self.v_head = ListNode()#不用判断链表边界的一步使用虚拟头节点
        self.size = 0
    def get(self, index: int) -> int:
        if index < 0 or index >= self.size:
            return -1
        current = self.v_head.next  #跳过虚拟头节点的无用数据从链表第一个开始
        for i in range(index):
            current = current.next
        return current.val
    #头插法需要新节点的next指向旧的头节点
    def addAtHead(self, val: int) -> None:
        self.v_head.next = ListNode(val,self.v_head.next)
        self.size += 1
    def addAtTail(self, val: int) -> None:
        current = self.v_head
        while current.next:#只要下一个节点存在，就往后走
            current = current.next
        current.next = ListNode(val)#走到最后一个节点，挂上新节点
        self.size += 1
    def addAtIndex(self, index: int, val: int) -> None:
        if index < 0 or index > self.size:
            return
        current = self.v_head
        for i in range(index):#因为是插入到前面前驱的所以index不用减1
            current = current.next
        current.next = ListNode(val,current.next)
        self.size += 1
    def deleteAtIndex(self, index: int) -> None:
        if index < 0 or index >= self.size:
            return 
        current = self.v_head
        for i in range(index):
            current = current.next
        current.next = current.next.next
        self.size -= 1


# Your MyLinkedList object will be instantiated and called as such:
# obj = MyLinkedList()
# param_1 = obj.get(index)
# obj.addAtHead(val)
# obj.addAtTail(val)
# obj.addAtIndex(index,val)
# obj.deleteAtIndex(index)
```

206.翻转链表

```python
# Definition for singly-linked list.
# class ListNode:
#     def __init__(self, val=0, next=None):
#         self.val = val
#         self.next = next
class Solution:
    def reverseList(self, head: Optional[ListNode]) -> Optional[ListNode]:
        pre = None
        cur = head
        while cur:
            tmp = cur.next
            cur.next = pre
            pre = cur
            cur = tmp
        return pre
```

24.链表相邻元素交换

```python
# Definition for singly-linked list.
# class ListNode:
#     def __init__(self, val=0, next=None):
#         self.val = val
#         self.next = next
class Solution:
    def swapPairs(self, head: Optional[ListNode]) -> Optional[ListNode]:
        v_head = ListNode(next = head)#虚拟头
        cur = v_head
        while cur.next and cur.next.next:
            tmp = cur.next
            tmp1 = cur.next.next.next
            cur.next = cur.next.next    #步骤1指向第二个数
            cur.next.next = tmp #步骤二第二个数换第一个
            tmp.next = tmp1#步骤3换完的第二个数指向原始的下一个数
            cur = cur.next.next #两两交换，cur跳到下两个位置准备下一轮交换
        return v_head.next
```

19.删除链表倒数第n个元素

```python
# Definition for singly-linked list.
# class ListNode:
#     def __init__(self, val=0, next=None):
#         self.val = val
#         self.next = next
class Solution:
    def removeNthFromEnd(self, head: Optional[ListNode], n: int) -> Optional[ListNode]:
        v_head = ListNode(next = head)
        fast = v_head
        slow = v_head
        # 要求倒数第n个数，只需要先让快指针走n步，随后两个指针一起走到尾节点，这样慢指针的下一个数就是倒数第n个数，直接next.next跳过该数即删除完毕
        for i in range(0,n):
            fast = fast.next
        while fast.next:
            fast = fast.next
            slow = slow.next
        slow.next = slow.next.next
        return v_head.next
```

title: 螺旋矩阵
content:
59.螺旋矩阵

本质就是需要判断边界进行写入，定好循环不变量的条件，使用左闭右开的形式做，从左向右，从上到下，从右到左，从下到上的顺序遍历写入，循环次数是输入数n的一半，奇数需要填入中心坐标的值，即(n//2,n//2)，循环完一次后需要把初始的行列加1，直到不满足循环条件

```python
class Solution:
    def generateMatrix(self, n: int) -> List[List[int]]:
        nums=[[0]*n for _ in range(n)]
        starx = 0
        stary = 0
        count = 1
        loop = n//2
        mid = n//2  #是奇数需要填的中心坐标
        for offset in range(1,loop+1):  #需要循环的次数为n//2
            for j in range(stary,n - offset):   #从左到右定行遍历列
                nums[starx][j] = count  #开始遍历i为starx
                count += 1
            for i in range(starx,n - offset):   #从上到下定列遍历行
                nums[i][n - offset] = count #上一次遍历完j为n-offset
                count += 1
            for j in range(n - offset,stary,-1):    #从右到左定行遍历列
                nums[n - offset][j] = count #上一次遍历完i为n-offset
                count += 1
            for i in range(n - offset,starx,-1):    #从下到上定列遍历行
                nums[i][stary] = count  #上一次遍历完j已经变成stary
                count += 1
            starx += 1
            stary += 1
        if n % 2 != 0:
            nums[mid][mid] = count  #奇数需要填进去最后一个数及其坐标
        return nums
```

146.螺旋遍历二维数组

```python
class Solution:
    def spiralArray(self, array: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]:
        if not array or not array[0]:
            return []
        rows = len(array)
        cols = len(array[0])
        if rows == 1:
            return array[0]
        if cols == 1:
            return [row[0] for row in array]
        starx = 0
        stary = 0
        loop = min(rows,cols)//2
        mid_r = rows // 2
        mid_c = cols // 2
        nums = []
        for offset in range(1,loop + 1):
            for j in range(stary,cols - offset):
                nums.append(array[starx][j])
            for i in range(starx,rows - offset):
                nums.append(array[i][cols - offset])
            for j in range(cols - offset,stary,-1):
                nums.append(array[rows - offset][j])
            for i in range(rows - offset,starx,-1):
                nums.append(array[i][stary])
            starx += 1
            stary += 1
        #  情况1:行列相等的矩阵
        if rows == cols and rows % 2 != 0:
            nums.append(array[mid_r][mid_c])
        #  情况2:行更多列数更少中间剩竖条
        if rows > cols and cols % 2 != 0:
            for i in range(starx, rows - loop):# 剩的是多的行减去循环次数的那行
                nums.append(array[i][mid_c])
        # 情况3:行更少，列数更多，中间剩横条
        elif rows < cols and rows % 2 == 1:
            for j in range(stary, cols - loop):#剩的是多的列减去循环次数的那一列
                nums.append(array[mid_r][j])
        return nums

```

title: 哈希表
content:
哈希表就是应用哈希函数将关键字映射到特定位置，并将记录放入这个位置，这样的表就叫哈希表。

哈希函数是记录关键字和存储地址之间的对应关系，一般哈希表都是用来快速判断一个元素是否出现集合里。

904.水果成篮

核心思想是求最大滑动窗口，同时用哈希表来记录个数

```python
class Solution:
    #本质就是求最大的滑动窗口[left,right]
    def totalFruit(self, fruits: List[int]) -> int:
        left = 0  #左指针即左边界
        ans = 0 #记录最长的滑动窗口
        cnt = defaultdict(int)  #记录每种水果类型的出现次数
        for right , j in enumerate(fruits):#右指针右移,j记录水果类型
            cnt[j] += 1 #新水果进入窗口
            while len(cnt) > 2: #水果类型多于两种
                out = fruits[left]  #要从左边开始移除的水果
                cnt[out] -= 1   #减少其计数
                if cnt[out] == 0:   
                    del cnt[out]    #为0后直接删除该键
                left += 1   #左指针右移窗口缩小
            ans = max(ans,right - left + 1) #更新最大滑动窗口
        return ans
```

title: 滑动窗口
content:
滑动窗口核心就是右边界不断加元素，随后判断是否重复，若重复则从左边界开始删

3.无重复字符的最长字串

```python
class Solution:
    def lengthOfLongestSubstring(self, s: str) -> int:
        ans = 0 #记录最长字串
        mystr = ""
        for x in s: #遍历
            while x in mystr:   #子字符串内有x，就进入循环
                #字符串切片，从第一个字符开始删除，直到内部无重复的x
                mystr = mystr[1:] 
            mystr += x #从后面加入到字符串
            ans = max(len(mystr),ans)
        return ans
```

title: 移除元素
二分查找
